sellers_note: RUGGED, REFINED, CAPABLE, RELIABLE, NONSMOKER, LEGENDARY! The 2023 Toyota Tacoma 4WD Limited Double Cab 5' Bed V6 pickup delivers a proven blend of durability, comfort, and off-road capability, backed by Toyota's reputation for long-lasting quality. With its four-wheel drive system and strong V6 performance, this truck is engineered to handle everything from daily driving to weekend adventures, living up to the spirit of Let's Go Places with confidence and versatility. Compared to rivals like the Chevrolet Colorado or Ford Ranger, the Tacoma stands apart with its legendary reliability, strong resale value, and a loyal following built over decades. Its off-road heritage and durable construction give it an edge for buyers who prioritize long-term dependability and trail-ready capability without sacrificing everyday usability. Critics did not just review it, they respected it. 2023 Kelley Blue Book Best Buy Award: Midsize Pickup Truck 2023 Kelley Blue Book 5-Year Cost to Own Award: Midsize Pickup 2023 Edmunds Top Rated Truck (Tacoma lineup) 2023 U.S. News Best Resale Value Award (Tacoma lineup) 2023 iSeeCars Best Value Retained Vehicle: Pickup Segment 2023 Vincentric Best Value in America Award: Midsize Pickup 2023 Consumer Reports Recommended Pickup (Tacoma lineup) 2023 ALG Residual Value Award: Midsize Pickup 2023 Autotrader Best Cars for Resale Value 2023 Car and Driver Editors' Choice: Pickup Truck With its odometer hovering around the 37,584 mile mark, it is STILL COVERED by the factory. Basic Warranty Coverage: 3 years or 36,000 miles, whichever comes first Powertrain Warranty Coverage: 5 years or 60,000 miles, whichever comes first Corrosion Perforation Warranty Coverage: 5 years with unlimited mileage Emissions Warranty Coverage: Federal emissions coverage up to 8 years or 80,000 miles on select components Want to extend its warranty coverage? In most cases, we can provide expanded options to cover each vehicle with a valuable, comprehensive warranty for years to come! This Tacoma is packed with purpose, delivering a smart combination of rugged utility and upscale comfort that fits perfectly with Toyota's reputation for building trucks that just keep going. TRD Performance Exhaust -- enhances engine sound and performance character Bed Step -- simplifies access to the truck bed Bed Extender -- increases cargo versatility for larger items Black Emblem Overlay -- adds a bold, custom appearance Door Sill Protector -- helps prevent scuffs during entry and exit Wheel Locks -- adds security for alloy wheels Spare Tire Lock -- protects the spare from theft Console Safe -- secures valuables inside the cabin Remote Tailgate Lock -- adds convenience and security 5'' Oval Tube Steps -- improve cabin access and exterior styling Mudguards -- help protect body panels from debris Door Edge Guards -- reduce risk of paint chips Roof Rack -- expands cargo carrying capability Bed Light -- improves nighttime visibility in the bed This Tacoma is built to handle real work and real adventure, offering the perfect blend of size and strength: Bed Measurements Length: 60.5 inches Capability Maximum Towing Capacity: up to 6,400 lbs Maximum Payload: approximately 1,135 lbs The Limited trim stands out with refined touches like leather-trimmed seating, premium interior materials, and advanced technology integration, making it one of the most comfortable Tacomas ever built while still retaining its rugged DNA. Under the hood, the 3.5L V6 engine delivers strong and dependable performance, paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission that provides smooth shifting and reliable operation. This setup balances capability and efficiency while maintaining the durability that Tacoma is known for. The exterior blends toughness with sophistication, featuring bold styling, chrome accents, and durable construction.
